data.evacuation_orders: Areas along Willow Creek Circle and West 30th Street

child_geo_events.name: Journey Home Animal Care Center Small Animal Shelter

data.information: Journey Home Animal Care Center will accept any pets from evacuated families. The shelter is open to help. Address: 1500 Prefontaine Ave, Rifle, CO 81650.

Those displaced by the North Rifle fires may seek refuge at the Garfield County Fairgrounds, where the Red Cross and DHS will provide support.

Resources are at the South Hall under the grandstand at the Garfield County Fairgrounds.

Per Rifle Police Department on Facebook.
